kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.selenium.dev/selenium/web/web-form.html
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Get Title
kw.msg: Title: 'Web form'
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'somebody@example.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Secret
kw.doc: Types the given secret from ``variable_name`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'Hello, Robot Framework! How are you today?' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) Two by attribute SelectAttribute.label from element [name="my-select"].
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'New York' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=input[type="checkbox"]'.
See also file:///C:/Users/roope/OneDrive/Tiedostot/HYTE%20projekti%20FE/HYTE/playwright-log.txt for additional details.

Error: locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: locator('input[type="checkbox"]') resolved to 2 elements: 1) <input checked type="checkbox" name="my-check" id="my-check-1" class="form-check-input"/> aka getByRole('checkbox', { name: 'Checked checkbox' }) 2) <input type="checkbox" name="my-check" id="my-check-2" class="form-check-input"/> aka getByRole('checkbox', { name: 'Default checkbox' })
Call log: - waiting for locator('input[type="checkbox"]')
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
